The '''Blade-30 fighter''' was a combat aircraft built by [[Tarrvin-on-Kallik]] on [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]].

==Characteristics==
The Blade-30 was distinguished primarily by having a two-seat [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]], with a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] handling the rear-firing [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. Like the Blade-32, the Blade-30 could be upgraded with a fully pressurized cockpit, allowing it to serve as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] as well as an [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] craft.

==History==
The Blade-30 was less common than both the preceding [[Blade-28 fighter|Blade-28]] and the succeeding [[Blade-32 superiority fighter|Blade-32]] and was used primarily by the Adumari forces.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]''
